title: pomaderris phylicifolia subsp. ericoides
intro: Pomaderris phylicifolia subsp. ericoides, also known as coastal pomaderris, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of coastal pomaderris include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. Coastal pomaderris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal applications.
